title: [epic] Extract Renode Meshtastic board definitions as standalone project
description:
Extract T-Echo, RAK4631, T-Deck board definitions as standalone Renode package.

WHY THIS DOESNT EXIST:
- Meshtastic firmware tested on real hardware (its the point)
- Board definitions need matching peripherals (SX126x, GPS, BLE) - chicken/egg
- Renode nRF52840 support is newer, less documented
- ESP32 Renode support is experimental (T-Deck, Heltec)
- No one has connected the dots: boards + peripherals + working example

WHAT WE HAVE:
- T-Echo .repl (nRF52840 + SX1262 + L76K GPS)
- RAK4631 .repl (nRF52840 + SX1262) - needs GPIO fix (r7h4.9)
- T-Deck .repl (ESP32-S3 + SX1262) - experimental
- Heltec WiFi LoRa32 V3 .repl (ESP32-S3)
- GPS.cs (218 lines) - NMEA over UART
- BLE.cs (511 lines) - nRF52840 BLE stub

EXTRACTION SCOPE:
1. Standalone repo: renode-meshtastic-boards
2. Depends on: renode-sx126x-peripheral (ddcu)
3. Board definitions with DTS-matching pin wiring
4. Example: boot Meshtastic firmware in Renode
5. CI that boots each board to shell prompt

TARGET USERS: Meshtastic contributors, device manufacturers, CI pipelines

ACCEPTANCE: Meshtastic firmware boots to shell in Renode on at least T-Echo
